title: Product sync — 2026-01-18
text:
# Weekly Product Sync — 2026-01-18
Attendees: PM, Eng Lead, CS Lead

## Discussion
- Sunrise Bank escalated Notifications problems again; churn risk flagged.
- Repeated ask for 'Slack integration' across accounts.
- Eng notes Notifications generates the most support load this month.

## Action items
- [ ] Evaluate 'Slack integration' for roadmap.
- [ ] Investigate Notifications performance regressions.
- [ ] Follow up with Sunrise Bank.
